roles.purpose: Own one project's goal, state, routing, loop prevention, and worker assignment.
roles.when_to_call: Whenever Tim starts or resumes a project lane.
roles.output_contract: One bounded mission packet or TIM_REQUIRED packet with routing rationale.
tim_required_for: Any restricted action, product direction ambiguity, cross-lane expansion, or remote/API action.

roles.purpose: Convert Tim natural language into mission intent and convert technical results back into Tim-readable summary.
roles.when_to_call: When a user request is fuzzy, broad, multi-part, or not yet structured.
roles.output_contract: Mission intent with goal, allowed scope, excluded scope, stop conditions, and exact questions if needed.
tim_required_for: Ambiguous product direction, missing authority, or unclear project identity.

roles.purpose: Maintain current project memory, freshness, handoff, and source trace.
roles.when_to_call: Before mission authoring, after preservation, or when context is stale.
tim_required_for: Access to product/private repos, stale/conflicting source truth, or archived reactivation.

roles.purpose: Coordinate branch/worktree lane isolation and collision detection.
roles.when_to_call: When more than one lane or worker could touch overlapping files.
roles.output_contract: Lane plan with ownership, collision result, stop signs, and merge recommendation.
tim_required_for: Any actual worktree creation/deletion, merge, push, rebase, or conflicting scope.

roles.purpose: Organize files, packets, manifests, checklists, and status surfaces.
roles.when_to_call: When evidence exists but is hard to navigate.
allowed_writes: TSF-local docs, manifests, indexes, status summaries
roles.output_contract: Sorted index, manifest, or checklist with source trace.
tim_required_for: Deleting, moving, or overwriting user/canonical work.

roles.purpose: Implement bounded TSF-local infrastructure or docs/control-plane changes.
roles.when_to_call: When a mission has exact allowed writes and validation.
roles.output_contract: Changed files plus validation evidence and preservation handoff.
tim_required_for: Any scope expansion or restricted action.

roles.purpose: Build or adapt TSF UI/prototype surfaces when explicitly scoped.
roles.when_to_call: When the mission is UI/prototype only and no runtime binding is approved.
roles.output_contract: Static UI artifact or prototype review packet with no command authority.
tim_required_for: Real Operator Console wiring, command execution, remote auth, deploy, or product repo access.

roles.purpose: Design or implement AI prompt/adapter/schema components inside TSF scope.
roles.when_to_call: When a bounded mission needs AI routing, prompts, or HQ packet structure.
roles.output_contract: Prompt/schema artifact with non-authority and validation notes.
tim_required_for: API usage, credentials, model behavior changes, production use.

roles.purpose: Create review-only data audits, missingness tables, and validation summaries.
roles.when_to_call: When a mission is data/source trace or formula review-only.
forbidden_actions: normal NWR packet reads without approval
roles.output_contract: Review-only dataset/report with source trace, missingness, caveats, and blocked uses.
tim_required_for: Source promotion, production/model use, canonical/normal NWR expansion.

roles.purpose: Run or create bounded tests and validation harness checks.
roles.when_to_call: When a mission has safe local test scope.
roles.output_contract: Test result report with commands, pass/fail, and failures.
tim_required_for: Proof runs, installs, product repo tests, broad fleet tests.

roles.purpose: Review changed scope, risks, evidence, and missing tests.
roles.when_to_call: Before ready/merge decisions or when risk is unclear.
roles.output_contract: Findings-first audit with merge/readiness recommendation and caveats.

roles.purpose: Create packets, manifests, summaries, or review bundles.
roles.when_to_call: When a mission needs durable handoff/export evidence.
roles.output_contract: Export packet with manifest and no-authority confirmation.
tim_required_for: Sending/uploading, external account changes, private data, or package publication.

roles.purpose: Find existing assets and source evidence before build work.
roles.when_to_call: At Phase 0 or before any claim something is missing.
roles.output_contract: Existing-asset trace with classification and reuse decision.
tim_required_for: Cross-lane expansion or protected repo/source access.

roles.purpose: Verify expected artifacts, scope, forbidden actions, and final state.
roles.when_to_call: After any worker result or before preservation/commit.
tim_required_for: Any verifier needing forbidden reads or product access.

roles.purpose: Perform bounded cleanup that preserves behavior and scope.
roles.when_to_call: When exact files and tests are known.
roles.output_contract: Small diff, unchanged behavior statement, tests.
tim_required_for: Behavior changes, broad scope, product repos, or missing tests.

roles.purpose: Write or update TSF docs, policies, role registries, and handoffs.
roles.when_to_call: When the output is a durable local doc/control-plane artifact.
roles.output_contract: Doc artifact with inputs, status, exclusions, and non-authority statement.
tim_required_for: Docs that imply restricted-action approval or production authority.

roles.purpose: Preserve packets, handoffs, release notes, and final status.
roles.when_to_call: Before cleanup, after validation, or before publication gates.
roles.output_contract: Durable packet with manifest, final decision, and next action.
tim_required_for: Actual push, merge, deploy, branch cleanup, or external publication.

roles.purpose: Provide strategic judgment for major choke points from a compact packet.
roles.when_to_call: Only for major architecture switch, ambiguous YELLOW, source-truth/model promotion, repeated loop, or conflicting workers.
allowed_writes: no local file mutation unless transcribed by TSF worker
roles.output_contract: GREEN/YELLOW/RED/TIM_REQUIRED strategic decision with allowed verdicts.
tim_required_for: Any API call, credentials, source-truth/model/ranking promotion, or restricted action.
